title: omphalodes ciliaris
intro: Omphalodes ciliaris, also known as the necklace navelwort, is a perennial plant species in the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Omphalodes ciliaris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an expectorant, making it useful in treating coughs and colds. Omphalodes ciliaris can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
